data.name: history.empty.subtitle
data.value: Probeer je zoekopdracht aan te passen

data.name: history.detail.empty
data.value: Selecteer een opname om details weer te geven

data.name: modes.header.subtitle
data.value: Maak aangepaste profielen voor verschillende contexten en werkstromen

data.name: vocabulary.description
data.value: Dit helpt de software om namen, acroniemen, slang, of woorden uit andere talen herkennen wanneer je talen mengt.

data.name: vocabulary.empty.subtitle
data.value: Voeg aangepaste woorden toe om de nauwkeurigheid van transcriptie te verbeteren

data.name: vocabulary.input.placeholder
data.value: Voeg een woord toe of maak een fragment

data.name: settings.general.launchAtLogin.subtitle
data.value: Start HyperWhisper automatically when you log in.

data.name: settings.general.launchMinimized.subtitle
data.value: Start HyperWhisper hidden in the system tray.

data.name: settings.general.minimizeToTray.subtitle
data.value: Closing the window minimizes to tray instead of quitting

data.name: settings.general.showRecordingWindow.subtitle
data.value: Display the recording overlay with audio visualization

data.name: settings.general.errorLogging.subtitle
data.value: Automatically send crash reports to help us fix issues. Your transcriptions are never sent.

data.name: settings.general.autoUpdate.subtitle
data.value: Silently check for new versions on startup

data.name: settings.appearance.theme.system.subtitle
data.value: Automatically switch between light and dark based on Windows settings

data.name: settings.appearance.theme.light.subtitle
data.value: Always use light theme with bright backgrounds

data.name: settings.appearance.theme.dark.subtitle
data.value: Always use dark theme for reduced eye strain

data.name: settings.license.activate.subtitle
data.value: Enter your license key to unlock unlimited usage

data.name: settings.license.trial.subtitle
data.value: Your daily usage limits reset at midnight

data.name: settings.credits.manage.subtitle
data.value: Add credits or manage your account

data.name: settings.credits.lowWarning
data.value: Your credits are running low. Consider adding more credits to continue using HyperWhisper Cloud.

data.name: settings.credits.exhaustedWarning
data.value: Your credits are exhausted. Add credits to continue using HyperWhisper Cloud transcription.

data.name: settings.cloud.activate.subtitle
data.value: Je accountsleutel is je portemonnee — hij bevat je Cloud-tegoed. Voer je sleutel in om te beginnen, of koop tegoed om er een te krijgen.

data.name: settings.cloud.getCredits.subtitle
data.value: Koop tegoed en we e-mailen je een accountsleutel.

data.name: settings.api.info
data.value: API-sleutels worden veilig op je apparaat opgeslagen en worden alleen naar de provider gestuurd wanneer nodig.

data.name: settings.api.postProcessing.subtitle
data.value: API-sleutels voor AI-aangedreven tekstverbetering en opmaak.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.openai
data.value: Invalid API key format. OpenAI keys should start with 'sk-'.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.groq
data.value: Invalid API key format. Groq keys should start with 'gsk_'.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.anthropic
data.value: Invalid API key format. Anthropic keys should start with 'sk-ant-'.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.gemini
data.value: Invalid API key format. Google API keys should start with 'AIza'.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.cerebras
data.value: Invalid API key format. Cerebras keys should start with 'csk-'.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.deepgram
data.value: Invalid API key format. Deepgram keys should be at least 32 characters.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.assemblyai
data.value: Invalid API key format. AssemblyAI keys should be at least 32 characters.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.elevenlabs
data.value: Invalid API key format. ElevenLabs keys should start with 'sk_'.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.mistral
data.value: Invalid API key format. Mistral keys should be at least 20 characters.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.grok
data.value: Ongeldig API-sleutelformaat. Grok-sleutels moeten beginnen met "xai-" en minimaal 20 tekens lang zijn.

data.name: settings.api.provider.openai.description
data.value: OpenAI's Whisper API for cloud-based transcription

data.name: settings.api.provider.groq.description
data.value: Groq Cloud's fast Whisper API with low latency

data.name: settings.api.provider.deepgram.description
data.value: Deepgram Nova family models with domain-specific tuning

data.name: settings.api.provider.assemblyai.description
data.value: AssemblyAI's speech-to-text platform with Universal and SLAM models

data.name: settings.api.provider.elevenlabs.description
data.value: ElevenLabs Scribe transcription with rich timestamps and diarization

data.name: settings.api.provider.mistral.description
data.value: Mistral's Voxtral speech-to-text with state-of-the-art accuracy

data.name: settings.api.provider.openai.post.description
data.value: OpenAI's GPT models for text enhancement

data.name: settings.api.provider.anthropic.description
data.value: Anthropic's Claude models for advanced text processing

data.name: settings.api.provider.gemini.description
data.value: Google's Gemini models for efficient text enhancement

data.name: settings.api.provider.groq.post.description
data.value: Groq's ultra-fast LLM inference for text enhancement

data.name: settings.api.provider.cerebras.description
data.value: Cerebras ultra-fast inference for text enhancement

data.name: settings.output.paste.subtitle
data.value: Geplakt getranscribeerde tekst automatisch in de actieve toepassing

data.name: settings.storage.recordings.subtitle
data.value: Choose where new recordings are stored.

data.name: settings.storage.notice
data.value: Het wijzigen van de opnamemap heeft alleen invloed op nieuwe opnamen. Bestaande opnamen blijven op hun originele locatie.

data.name: errors.noSpeechDetected
data.value: No speech detected in the recording.

data.name: transcripts.delete.single.message
data.value: Hiermee wordt deze opname en het bijbehorende audiobestand permanent verwijderd.

data.name: transcripts.delete.multiple.message
data.value:
Hiermee worden %d opnamen en hun audiobestanden permanent verwijderd.
Dit kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt.

data.name: audio.error.recordingPathNotSet
data.value: Internal error: recording path not set

data.name: settings.models.download.cancelled
data.value: Download was cancelled by the user

data.name: postprocessing.error.apiKeyNotSet
data.value: Post-processing disabled - API key not set

data.name: mode.editor.arm64.info
data.value: Local transcription is not available on ARM64 Windows. Please use a cloud provider.

data.name: mode.editor.field.customInstructions.hint
data.value: Define how the AI should process your transcription

data.name: modes.cloudAccuracy.groqWhisper.description
data.value: Groq Whisper - fastest transcription, lowest cost

data.name: modes.cloudAccuracy.deepgramNova3.description
data.value: Deepgram Nova-3 - balanced speed and accuracy

data.name: modes.cloudAccuracy.elevenLabsScribeV2.description
data.value: ElevenLabs Scribe v2 - highest accuracy, slower

data.name: modes.cloudAccuracy.grokStt.description
data.value: xAI Grok STT - highest accuracy, slower

data.name: mode.editor.warning.vocabularyUnsupported
data.value: Custom vocabulary is not supported with this provider.

data.name: mode.editor.warning.vocabularyUnsupported.parakeet
data.value: Custom vocabulary is not supported with Parakeet models.

data.name: mode.editor.warning.vocabularyUnsupported.elevenlabs
data.value: Custom vocabulary is not supported with ElevenLabs Scribe V1.

data.name: mode.editor.warning.vocabularyUnsupported.mistral
data.value: Custom vocabulary is not supported with Mistral.

data.name: mode.editor.warning.vocabularyUnsupported.deepgramBase
data.value: Custom vocabulary is not supported with Deepgram Base models.

data.name: mode.editor.warning.vocabularyUnsupported.deepgramWhisper
data.value: Custom vocabulary is not supported with Deepgram Whisper models.

data.name: mode.editor.warning.nova3AutoDetect
data.value: Custom vocabulary is disabled when using auto-detect with Nova models. Set a specific language to enable vocabulary boosting.

data.name: mode.editor.spelling.hint
data.value: Choose spelling variant for English text

data.name: mode.editor.postProcessing.screenText.hint
data.value: Capture visible screen text to improve accuracy of names and terms

data.name: mode.editor.provider.openai.tooltip
data.value: Industry-standard Whisper model with excellent accuracy

data.name: mode.editor.provider.deepgram.tooltip
data.value: Real-time transcription with custom vocabulary boosting

data.name: mode.editor.provider.mistral.tooltip
data.value: European AI provider with multilingual support

data.name: mode.editor.provider.grok.tooltip
data.value: xAI Grok spraak naar tekst (batch HTTP)

data.name: mode.editor.provider.hyperwhisper.tooltip
data.value: Fast, accurate transcription - no API key required

data.name: mode.editor.delete.confirm.message
data.value:
Are you sure you want to delete the mode "{0}"?
This action cannot be undone.

data.name: mode.editor.delete.cannotDelete.message
data.value:
Cannot delete the last remaining mode.
You must have at least one mode.

data.name: settings.shortcuts.tooltip
data.value: Click and press the keys you want to use

data.name: settings.general.startup.enableFailed
data.value: Failed to enable launch at startup. Please check if you have permission to modify startup settings.

data.name: settings.general.startup.disableFailed
data.value: Failed to disable launch at startup. Please check if you have permission to modify startup settings.

data.name: settings.models.delete.confirm.message
data.value:
Are you sure you want to delete {0}?
You can re-download it later.

data.name: settings.license.deactivate.confirm.message
data.value: Are you sure you want to deactivate your license? You will revert to trial mode with limited features.

data.name: settings.storage.error.invalidFolder
data.value: Unable to use the selected folder.

data.name: settings.storage.folderBrowser.description
data.value: Choose a folder for new recordings

data.name: settings.storage.autoDelete.subtitle
data.value: Automatically delete old recordings to save disk space

data.name: settings.storage.autoDelete.confirmDelete.message
data.value: This will permanently delete old recordings. Continue?

data.name: license.status.trial.description
data.value: Local transcription is free and unlimited.

data.name: settings.models.noGpu.description
data.value: For best performance, an NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support is recommended for local transcription.

data.name: settings.models.gpu.recommendBase
data.value: GPU not detected. We recommend using the Base model for CPU transcription.

data.name: errors.fileTooLarge
data.value: File is too large for this provider. Maximum size: {0}

data.name: settings.sound.enableSoundEffects.subtitle
data.value: Speel een geluid af wanneer de opname start en stopt

data.name: home.gettingStarted.mode.description
data.value: Pas transcriptie aan voor verschillende workflows

data.name: home.gettingStarted.vocabulary.description
data.value: Verbeter de nauwkeurigheid voor namen en jargon

data.name: update.available.subtitle
data.value: Een nieuwe versie van HyperWhisper is beschikbaar!

data.name: update.toast
data.value: Een nieuwe versie van HyperWhisper is beschikbaar

data.name: update.skipped.message
data.value: U heeft gekozen deze update over te slaan.

data.name: update.error.appcast
data.value: Kan niet controleren op updates. Controleer uw internetverbinding.

data.name: update.error.download
data.value: Er is een fout opgetreden bij het downloaden van de update: {0}

data.name: update.error.unknownFormat
data.value: Het gedownloade bestand "{0}" heeft een onbekend formaat.

data.name: home.microphone.low.message
data.value: Het ingangsvolume van {0} is ongeveer {1}%. Verhoog dit naar minimaal 25% in de geluidsinstellingen.

data.name: mode.editor.gemini.customPrompt.placeholder
data.value: Optionele instructies om de Gemini-transcriptie te begeleiden...

data.name: mode.editor.provider.soniox.tooltip
data.value: Asynchrone transcriptie met het nieuwste STT-model van Soniox

data.name: mode.editor.warning.parakeetLanguageUnsupported
data.value: Parakeet v3 ondersteunt deze taal niet. Overweeg Whisper of een cloudprovider.

data.name: mode.editor.warning.parakeetV2EnglishOnly
data.value: Parakeet v2 ondersteunt alleen Engels. De taal wordt ingesteld op Engels.

data.name: settings.api.invalidKey.soniox
data.value: Ongeldig API-sleutelformaat. Soniox-sleutels moeten minimaal 10 tekens lang zijn.

data.name: settings.backup.export.apiKeysWarning
data.value: API-sleutels worden als platte tekst opgeslagen in het back-upbestand.

data.name: settings.backup.export.subtitle
data.value: Sla instellingen, modi en woordenschat op in een back-upbestand.

data.name: settings.backup.import.confirmReplace.message
data.value: Dit verwijdert alle huidige instellingen, modi, woordenschat en transcripties voordat geïmporteerd wordt. Dit kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt. Doorgaan?

data.name: settings.backup.import.replaceExisting.subtitle
data.value: Alle bestaande gegevens wissen voordat geïmporteerd wordt. Als dit niet aangevinkt is, worden gegevens samengevoegd.

data.name: settings.backup.import.subtitle
data.value: Herstel instellingen, modi en woordenschat vanuit een back-upbestand.

data.name: settings.backup.notice
data.value: Back-ups bevatten instellingen, modi en woordenschat. Audioopnamebestanden zijn niet inbegrepen.

data.name: settings.shortcuts.pushToTalk.custom.tooltip
data.value: Klik en druk op de toetsen voor push-to-talk

data.name: settings.shortcuts.pushToTalk.doublePress
data.value: Dubbel drukken om opname te vergrendelen

data.name: settings.shortcuts.pushToTalk.doublePress.subtitle
data.value: Druk twee keer snel in om op te nemen zonder ingedrukt te houden

data.name: settings.shortcuts.pushToTalk.subtitle
data.value: Houd een toets ingedrukt om op te nemen, laat los als u klaar bent

data.name: settings.sound.autoIncreaseMicVolume.subtitle
data.value: Stelt automatisch de microfooningang in op 90% bij het starten van een opname en herstelt het oorspronkelijke niveau bij stoppen.

data.name: settings.api.provider.localLlm.description
data.value: Runs on-device and does not need an API key.

data.name: settings.models.localLlm.subtitle
data.value: Offline post-processing models stored on this device

data.name: settings.models.localLlm.hardware.cpuFallback
data.value: Runtime: CPU fallback. No GPU acceleration device was detected.

data.name: settings.models.localLlm.hardware.cudaFirst
data.value: CUDA will be tried first, with CPU fallback if loading fails

data.name: settings.models.localLlm.hardware.cudaRequiresNvidia
data.value: CPU fallback. CUDA acceleration requires an NVIDIA GPU

data.name: settings.models.localLlm.hardware.sharedGpu
data.value: Local LLM and Whisper may share GPU memory; use a smaller model if transcription slows.

data.name: settings.models.localLlm.missingModel
data.value: Local LLM model '{0}' is not downloaded. Download it in Model Library.

data.name: settings.models.localLlm.diskSpace
data.value: Not enough disk space to download {0}. Need {1}, available {2}.

data.name: settings.models.localLlm.invalidModelFile
data.value: Downloaded file is not a valid GGUF model.

data.name: mode.editor.localLlm.downloadDescription
data.value: {0} Download it in Model Library first.

data.name: vocabulary.autoLearned.clearConfirm.message
data.value: Remove {0} auto-learned vocabulary entries? Manually added entries stay.

data.name: settings.general.support.openFailed
data.value: Could not open the support page: {0}

data.name: settings.credits.subtitle
data.value: Track your HyperWhisper Cloud balance and usage

data.name: settings.api.provider.grok.post.description
data.value: xAI Grok models for text enhancement

data.name: settings.output.autocapitalizeInsert.subtitle
data.value: Match cursor context when inserting text

data.name: settings.output.autocapitalizeInsert.permissionMessage
data.value: Some applications (like web browsers and Electron apps) may not expose the focused text field. Autocapitalize Insert will pass through unchanged in those cases — the feature still works in most native editors and Office applications.

data.name: settings.output.hideClipboardHistory.subtitle
data.value: Prevent transcriptions from appearing in Windows clipboard history

data.name: settings.storage.storeAsM4A.subtitle
data.value: Converts WAV recordings to smaller files after transcription. Turn off to keep original WAV files.

data.name: settings.about.openLogFolder.failed.message
data.value: HyperWhisper could not open the log folder. Please try again or export diagnostics instead. Details: {0}

data.name: settings.models.parakeet.subtitle
data.value: Recommended for most users. Multilingual model supports 25 languages.

data.name: modes.cloudAccuracy.azureMaiTranscribe.description
data.value: Microsoft MAI-Transcribe 1.5 - 43 languages with phrase biasing

data.name: mode.editor.postProcessing.appAwareHint
data.value: AI post-processing can adapt formatting to the active app, such as email, chat, documents, code, or terminal windows. Local API callers can pass applicationContext explicitly; it is not captured automatically for API requests.

data.name: settings.streaming.enable.subtitle
data.value: Use a separate hotkey to transcribe continuously and paste final speech segments into the active app.

data.name: settings.streaming.provider.subtitle
data.value: Choose the service used for real-time transcription.

data.name: settings.streaming.providerStatus.hyperwhisperCloud
data.value: Uses your HyperWhisper license or trial credits. No separate API key is required.

data.name: settings.streaming.providerStatus.deepgram.missingKey
data.value: Deepgram streaming requires a Deepgram API key in the Model Library API keys manager.

data.name: settings.streaming.providerStatus.elevenLabs.missingKey
data.value: ElevenLabs streaming requires an ElevenLabs API key in the Model Library API keys manager.

data.name: settings.streaming.providerStatus.openAI.missingKey
data.value: OpenAI streaming requires an OpenAI API key in the Model Library API keys manager.

data.name: settings.streaming.providerStatus.xai.missingKey
data.value: xAI streaming requires a Grok API key in the Model Library API keys manager.

data.name: settings.streaming.warning.vocabularyUnsupported
data.value: Custom vocabulary is not used with the selected streaming provider.

data.name: settings.streaming.warning.vocabularyAutoDetect
data.value: Custom vocabulary is disabled for streaming when language is set to auto. Set a specific language to enable vocabulary boosting.

data.name: settings.streaming.language.subtitle
data.value: Pick the language used for streaming transcription.

data.name: settings.streaming.fastFormatting.subtitle
data.value: Return formatted text with lower latency.

data.name: settings.sound.mediaControl.subtitle
data.value: Control other audio while HyperWhisper is recording.

data.name: settings.sound.mediaControl.mode.subtitle
data.value: Mute system output so music, calls, or videos do not bleed into dictation.

data.name: settings.sound.keepMicrophoneWarm.subtitle
data.value: Keep a quiet idle input stream open between recordings to reduce startup delay, especially with Bluetooth microphones.

data.name: providerApiKey.subtitle
data.value: Add your {0} API key to unlock this provider in Model Library.

data.name: providerApiKey.secureStorage
data.value: Stored securely in Windows Credential Manager.

data.name: providerApiKey.invalid.message
data.value: That does not look like a valid {0} API key.

data.name: settings.localApi.blurb
data.value: Localhost-only HTTP API for MCP clients, benchmark scripts, and shell automation. Off by default. When on, HyperWhisper listens on 127.0.0.1 and writes the port + bearer token to %LOCALAPPDATA%\HyperWhisper\local-api.json with restricted file permissions.

data.name: settings.localApi.helperAuth
data.value: Sent as Authorization: Bearer <token>. Required on every endpoint except /health.

data.name: settings.localApi.mcp.caption
data.value: Drop into Cursor, Claude Code, or Claude Desktop's mcpServers block. The wrapper auto-reads the port and token from the discovery file at startup — no secrets in client config.

data.name: settings.localApi.curl.caption
data.value: Pre-filled with your port and token.

data.name: settings.backup.import.nothingSelected
data.value: Selecteer ten minste één sectie om te importeren.

data.name: settings.backup.import.premerge.message
data.value: {0} nieuwe woorden toevoegen, {1} conflicten met bestaande woorden. Doorgaan?
